ContactSubmission.title: Contact Submission
ContactSubmission.description: A submission from the contact form on the website.

name.description: The name of the person submitting the form.

email.description: The email address of the person submitting the form.

phone.description: The phone number of the person submitting the form.

clinicType.description: The type of clinic (e.g., dermatology, dentistry, gynecology).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the submission was created.

/submissions.description: Collection of all contact form submissions.
